productDisplayName: Baggit Women Brown Cockroach Parina Wallet
description: Style NoteWith its unusual colour story and chic styling this wallet from baggit easily makes it into our wishlist this Summer. Carry it with western and ethnic outfits to infuse a touch of  glamour to your ensemble. Its multiple pockets and slots help you stay organised- in style. Product DetailsThree fold brown wallet with zippered compartment at back that has a zippered separator and a zippered pocket at the back, Print and zipper detailing on the front. Once opened five credit card slots, one id card slot and two slip pockets on one side and seven credit card slots with an id card slot in the centre foldMagnetic button closureMaterials and CareFabricWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 12.5 cmWidth:20 cm
